title: Intensely Smoky American Sweet Potato Bowl
description: A smoky, silky, and satisfying American dish featuring chilli flakes and render fat, perfect for a Jain-friendly brunch
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, toss the diced sweet potatoes with render fat, chilli flakes, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated
Spread the sweet potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes
After 20 minutes, stir the sweet potatoes and continue to roast for an additional 15 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned
While the sweet potatoes are roasting, prepare the lacquerware bowls by warming them in the oven for a few minutes
To assemble the bowls, divide the roasted sweet potatoes among the warmed lacquerware bowls
Garnish each bowl with chopped fresh cilantro and serve immediately
